item.title: "Fragrant Zrazy - Very Tasty and Hearty
item.description: Zrazy is a traditional Eastern European dish, usually made with meat and a potato or dough exterior, stuffed with various fillings. Ingredients: Potatoes - 1 kg Ground beef - 500 g Onion - 1 piece Tomato - 1 piece Tomato paste Cheese - 200 g Flour - 2 tbsp Eggs - 2 pieces Salt, pepper, garlic, and paprika.
item.dc:creator: lyliatom211

item.title: Random Birthday Dump
item.description:
It's my birthday today, I work til 8 pm.
Currently at my sister's house working because I live in St Petersburg FL and my office building had the first 2 floors take heavy damage and flooding and it's closed.
My house took 6 feet of water and isn't livable atm
I saved my clothes, my computer and my art so I got that going for me.
Really glad it wasn't worse.
Looking forward to getting some sushi later after work and enjoying tomorrow off
FP Edit: Having a rough week plz send some good advice or funny memes
item.dc:creator: Sensiblyinteresting

item.title: My childhood dream cosplay finally done - Selene cosplay from Underworld by YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://www.instagram.com/reel/DBRvkZfSWv_/ Hello everyone! Sharing a little video of my Selene cosplay from the movie Underworld, it meant a lot to me to finally be able to cosplay her for this year's Halloween season, she's such an underrated character. I wish you all an amazing day Yuzu

item.dc:creator: andante89

item.title: A Very Canadian Genocide: The Murdered & Missing Indigenous Women
item.description:
Canada is a lovely country. Very nice people. Very friendly. Very civilized. So polite. So built on a heap of Indigenous death and suffering that continues to this day. Yes, it is a genocide, and yes, it is ongoing, even as you read this. As a Canadian educator I can say that as a country we're getting better at the words, such as routine land acknowledgements and orange shirt day -- but the actions are still horrific. Indigenous human beings are still dying in horrific numbers, especially women. ESPECIALLY WOMEN.
You've seen pictures in this thread of red dresses. This has become a symbol of remembrance and defiance among activists. In 2024 Canada, Indigenous women remain far more likely to experience domestic violence, sexual assault, poverty and murder. Rates of mental illness and addiction are sky-high. Indigenous women make up around 50% of all federal prisoners, despite making up only 5% of the population. They make up around 60% of incarcerated youth at the provincial level. Activism is extraordinarily difficult because everything in this country focuses on trying to make us look and feel good rather than acknowledge and tackle systemic issues. Launching an inquiry about MMIW took years and had to come massive indifference and resistance, and its recommendations have been almost entirely ignored. So what's to be done? I offer no course of action. As a teacher I will say that Canadian schools have worked hard to raise awareness about the genocide (but only rarely calling it that) but there is serious fatigue among teachers and students alike -- and in any event the efforts have mostly been symbolic, such as wearing orange shirts. Meanwhile, the genocide continues.
Item: The Highway of Tears Number of dead & missing: 18-40+ Highway 16 runs east-west in northern British Columbia and Alberta, in western Canada, for around 700km (450 miles), serving many remote communities. For decades, the only way to get around if you didn't have a car was to hitchhike. And God, that's dangerous. But not all the victims were hitchhikers. The point is, from at least the 1960s until today (and it's ongoing), women have disappeared or been found murdered along this route. The Royal Canadian Mounted Police (RCMP) pegs the number at under 18, but activists have catalogues over 40 victims. It's now believed that a large number of the victims fell to serial killers, but there are still so many unsolved cases. Make a note of that: a big difference in perception between the cops (especially the RCMP) and indigenous activists. We're going to be hearing a lot more about that.
Item: The Pickton Murders Number of Missing & Murdered: 49 Robert Pickton operated a pig farm in British Columbia, Canada. He was a serial killer who murdered women. His hunting ground was Vancouver's Downtown East Side, a notorious area that's rife with severe homelessness, drug addiction and crime. He'd bring them to his farm and when he was done with them he'd feed them to his pigs. The police had plenty of warnings about him, including one from a woman who managed to escape, but the police dismissed them all. Part of it was the fact that bikers hung out at his farm and those bikers were in good with the cops, but mostly it was just an attitude that was and remains rife among law enforcement officials: sex workers who walk the street are essentially disposable. When they disappear, the cops shrug. It's why serial killers target them the way they do. I should note that only some of Pickton's murders were Indigenous. However, the horrific revelations about his case finally stirred awareness and action about the issue of Missing and Murdered Indigenous Women.
Item: The Brady Landfill (garbage dump), Winnipeg, Manitoba Number of Missing & Murdered: perhaps four A serial killer confessed to murdering four Indigenous women and disposing of their bodies at the local dump, like they were garbage. The remains of one were found, the others yet to be located. The authorities refused to fund a search. Then a provincial election saw a change of government and the new premier, Wab Kinew, who is himself Indigenous, funded a search, which will finally get underway in the fall of 2024. His message: "To me, this is about sending a message to everyone in Manitoba that you matter. That every single person in this province has dignity and that when somebody goes missing, we go looking because we care." Unfortunately getting the search done took years of hard fighting by activists.
Item: forced sterilization of Indigenous women Number of women affected: unknown, possibly hundreds During the 20th Century, Canada, like every other industrialized country, jumped on board the eugenics bandwagon, adopting the view that forced sterilization of "undesirables" could help "purify" the blood of the nation. Canada being Canada, this was heavily directed at the Indigenous population, with women being sterilized without their consent, sometimes without their knowledge. What's truly shocking about this is that it continued in Canada LONG after it had stopped elsewhere, the most recent case happening in 2019. Only in October 2024 was it finally outlawed.
Item: The 60s Scoop Number of affected: perhaps 20,000 We all know that child welfare programs exist to protect children. In extreme circumstances, they'll remove children from unhealthy situations and put them in foster care, even adoption. Well, in Canada, this process was used as an instrument of cultural genocide, removing children from Indigenous families and putting them up for adoption in white families. It had one obvious goal: to separate Indigenous children from their roots, forcibly integrating them into colonial society. It was certainly effective in this goal, with a generation of young people growing up with no knowledge at all about the societies of their birth. Many were even shipped abroad, to families in the US or as far away as New Zealand. All for the benefit of the children, of course!
Item: Residential schools Number of affected: approx 150,000 Looming in the background of all the previous items on this list is the horrific, genocidal phenomenon of Canada's residential schools. Honestly it could fill up a massive post on its own, but it would be damn hard to read (and to write). Let's just sum it up: for over a century, children were forcibly removed from Indigenous communities and forced into church-run schools, where they were subjected to every imaginable form of abuse on a mass scale. The schools closed down many years ago, but it remains an unfolding story with the continuing discovery of mass graves at former school locations. It is also subject to mass denial by many in Canada, who insist the schools were fine.
item.dc:creator: Huor

item.title: Ohhh BURN!!! Nailed it!!
item.description: People need acceptance, everyone should be able to live the life they were born to live. Sometimes people are born in the wrong body, and that's ok... They have to fight so many battles just to live in a body and gender they feel themselves in, they don't need hate, or pressure to be someone they're not!! It's 2024, be on the good side of history ffs!!

item.title: Flooring A Garage
item.description: Video originally said, "laying epoxy flooring." But I think It's a tinted polyurea base, followed by vinyl chip flakes, scraped, then topped with a polyaspartic clear coat. The money is not in the coating but rather the surface prep. Your concrete must be totally free of debris, oil, gaps, everything. If not, the coating will peel up soon after. The flake is nice for home garages, but if you're a mechanic, you probably want to go with a solid color, or you may be on your hands and knees searching for a dropped nut. This size garage probably costs between $5,000 and $8,000 depending on location.
item.dc:creator: UnattendedDeviant

item.title: the harpy's meme library: volume 66 (incredibly mysterious)
item.description:
Unhappily for us all! Hello and welcome to yet another meme dump, my imgur friends. The depression monster has been lurking this week, threatening to eat me (and not even in the fun way). Join me in viewing amusing images to distract from the frustration that is existence. Onwards!
Thanks, god
I'll be lurking about this Halloween, see if you can spot me
so cryptic, much allure. wow. very mystery.
super fucken weird
¯\_(ツ)_/¯
if not friend, why friend shaped?
I miss the days when every CD came with am album sleeve that included all the lyrics
but in the end, it doesn't even matter All righty, you've made it to the end of this dump! Until next time imgur friends, don't forget to be awesome.
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.title: Wishing a bottom shelf happy birthday to the pizza that shook the internet! ..plus memes, panhandling, and something something 465/744 hours of being live...
item.description:
Happy 17th birthday to what is arguably the internet’s most famous pizza: None Pizza with Left Beef!
On October 19th, 2007, Molaro posted the results of this experiment on his humor blog, The Sneeze. First, he ordered a pizza to see if the toppings would truly arrive on the “left” or “right” side as he requested. As an afterthought, he decided to see what would happen if he additionally ordered a pizza without sauce, without cheese, and with beef on the left side. A “None Pizza with Left Beef,” as he called it.
It still has its own merch.
Spooky how fast 17 years has flown by already; it still feels like yesterday. Happy birthday @nonepizzawithIeftbeef @NONEPIZZAWITHLEFTBEEF @nonepizzawithleftbeeef & @nonepizzawitleftbeef
& happy birthday to @MostLikelyNotWearingPants as well
Enjoy memes.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
We have been currently streaming live for 465 hours to help raise money on behalf of Imgur for Extra-Life. You can catch us live for the next 12 days, 2 hours, 47 minutes, and 42 seconds on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka
Speaking of #handmade the auction for Extra-Life just began today on the Bottom shelf community server and will continue until October 31st. You can find these pieces in the Creator's Corner on discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka where 100% of the money goes straight to Extra-Life to support our local Children's Hospital. All pieces are handcrafted donations by amazing artists we met on Imgur. This piece was donated by @tallandartsy with a starting bid of $75
This piece from @sciron begins at $60
This canvas by @mnstr_qn begins at $20
This magic wand from @14367 starts at $20
"The Sillies" by @lukehdarowlet start at $15
& "The Falls" will start at $70
Are we insane? Yes...but we are doing whatever it takes to reach our donation goals FERDA KIDS! I have been gifted the honor of getting to host Imgur's 2024 Extra-Life 24 hour stream happening on November 2nd. Imgur/Medialabs themselves have already approved the idea of me taking an ice bath live on their stream IF WE REACH OUR GOAL OF $9,000 BEFORE THE STREAM. We have currently raised $6,233.10 with 12 days remaining. You can make a donation at https://Extra-Life.org/participant/bottomshelfvodka Every dollar makes a difference. Even if you're in no position to make a donation, you can still support a good cause by lurking sometime on our 30-consecutive-day streamathon. We have finally reached the minecraft & lofi portion of the stream where we bullshit with our buddies.
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax 465/744 hours live in effort to try to raise money ferda kids. I really hope it isn't in vain. My brain is mashed potatoes. If you want more memes, find them on discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: I need points to chat with Pizza Angels.
item.description: Here's a compilation of kids absolutely eating it in halls of mirrors. Update: I wasn't using an up to date app, which broke my commend and chat feed. Thanks for the advice, yall! Update 2: Most Viral?! I guess we can all watch kids bonk their heads all day, eh? I guess if anyone's interested in helping a fellow imgurian out, I broke my leg really badly 6 months ago and took a huge financial hit. I'm barely recovered enough to work, and any funds will help until I get paid from my new job. Cashapp: $andreeager
item.dc:creator: EagerBarista
